oneLiner: Real-time call coaching overlay that suggests what to say next, safely and fast.
icp: Revenue teams doing discovery, evaluation, and negotiation calls.
differentiators: Low-latency coaching overlay with guardrails (sanitized patches + deterministic fallback).
Trust dashboard + telemetry for adoption (apply/dismiss/mute signals).
proofPoints: Works even when LLM is off (deterministic playbooks).
Designed to avoid logging raw transcripts by default (hash + length).
allowedClaims: We can share security docs upon request
We support tenant-level product packs and guardrails
